---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**What's the feature?**
  A clear, concise description of the new capability you'd like to see in GitBunki.

  **Why is it useful?**
  What problem does it solve, or what workflow does it unlock? Who benefits?

  **How might it work?**
  Rough idea of the UX — where it lives in the app, what the interaction looks like. Sketches, mockups, or "it should behave like X in Y app"
  comparisons all welcome.

  **Additional context**
  Screenshots, links to similar features in other tools, related issues, etc.
